languages.text: Лария пытается убедить Себериана действовать осмотрительно и положиться на соратников. Быть может, если склонить участников совета на ее сторону, удастся разорвать временную петлю.

traits.locale_text: Лария пытается убедить Себериана действовать осмотрительно и положиться на соратников. Быть может, если склонить участников совета на ее сторону, удастся разорвать временную петлю.

languages.text: Laria is attempting to persuade Seberian to act with caution and trust his allies. Perhaps, if the council can be swayed to her side, the temporal loop can be broken.
languages.original_text: Лария пытается убедить Себериана действовать осмотрительно и положиться на соратников. Быть может, если склонить участников совета на ее сторону, удастся разорвать временную петлю.

traits.locale_text: Laria is attempting to persuade Seberian to act with caution and to trust his allies. Perhaps, if the council can be swayed to her side, the temporal loop may be broken.
Laria is attempting to persuade Seberian to act with caution and to trust his allies. Perhaps, if the council can be swayed to her side, the temporal loop may be broken.
Laria is attempting to persuade Seberian to act with caution and trust his allies. Perhaps, if the council can be swayed to her side, the temporal loop can be broken.
Laria is attempting to persuade Seberian to act with caution and trust his allies. Perhaps, if the council can be swayed to her side, the temporal loop can be broken.

languages.text: Laria versucht Seberian zu überzeugen, vorsichtig vorzugehen und seinen Verbündeten zu vertrauen. Vielleicht kann die Zeitschleife durchbrochen werden, wenn sich der Rat auf ihre Seite schlägt.
languages.original_text: Laria is attempting to persuade Seberian to act with caution and trust his allies. Perhaps, if the council can be swayed to her side, the temporal loop can be broken.

traits.locale_text: Laria versucht Seberian zu überzeugen, vorsichtig vorzugehen und seinen Verbündeten zu vertrauen. Vielleicht kann die Zeitschleife durchbrochen werden, wenn sich der Rat auf ihre Seite schlägt.

languages.text: Laria tente de convaincre Seberian d'être prudent et de faire confiance à ses alliés. Si le conseil se range à son avis, la boucle temporelle sera peut-être brisée.
languages.original_text: Laria is attempting to persuade Seberian to act with caution and trust his allies. Perhaps, if the council can be swayed to her side, the temporal loop can be broken.

traits.locale_text: Laria tente de convaincre Seberian d'être prudent et de faire confiance à ses alliés. Si le conseil se range à son avis, la boucle temporelle sera peut-être brisée.

languages.text: 菈丽雅正试图说服塞贝里安谨慎行事，信任他的盟友。也许说服军事议会站到她这边，就能打破时间循环。
languages.original_text: Laria is attempting to persuade Seberian to act with caution and trust his allies. Perhaps, if the council can be swayed to her side, the temporal loop can be broken.

traits.locale_text: 菈丽雅正试图说服塞贝里安谨慎行事，信任他的盟友。也许说服军事议会站到她这边，就能打破时间循环。

languages.text: Laria trata de convencer a Seberian para que proceda con cautela y confíe en sus aliados. Si el consejo se pone de su parte, tal vez pueda romperse el bucle temporal.
languages.original_text: Laria is attempting to persuade Seberian to act with caution and trust his allies. Perhaps, if the council can be swayed to her side, the temporal loop can be broken.

traits.locale_text: Laria trata de convencer a Seberian para que proceda con cautela y confíe en sus aliados. Si el consejo se pone de su parte, tal vez pueda romperse el bucle temporal.

languages.text: ラリアはセベリアンに慎重に行動し、仲間を頼るよう説得する。評議会のメンバーたちを味方につければ、タイムループは解けるかもしれない。
languages.original_text: Laria tries to persuade Seberian to act prudently and rely on his companions. Maybe if she can get the council members on her side, the time loop can be broken.

languages.text: Laria, Seberian'ı temkinli davranmaya ve müttefiklerine güvenmeye ikna etmeye çalışıyor. Belki konsey onun tarafına çekilirse zaman döngüsü kırılabilir.
languages.original_text: Laria is attempting to persuade Seberian to act with caution and trust his allies. Perhaps, if the council can be swayed to her side, the temporal loop can be broken.

traits.locale_text: Laria, Seberian'ı temkinli davranmaya ve müttefiklerine güvenmeye ikna etmeye çalışıyor. Belki konsey onun tarafına çekilirse zaman döngüsü kırılabilir.
